headline: Think Together and AT&T Expand Digital Learning Opportunities for Lynwood Students Through The Achievery
summary: Think Together, in collaboration with AT&T, celebrated the expansion of The Achievery, AT&T's safe, online digital education platform designed to support K-12 student learning. Held at Cesar Chavez Middle School in Lynwood, students enrolled in LevelUp Lynwood in partnership with Think Together, shared their experiences with The Achievery platform, alongside district, business and community leaders.
